global_description: A small, slender bird with a predominantly black and white plumage. It has a straight, chisel-like bill and a distinctive white stripe running down its back. The wings and tail are black with white spots, and its head features a black cap with a white face.

part_details.head: Black cap with a white face and a small, sharp, chisel-like bill.
part_details.back: Predominantly black with a distinctive white stripe running longitudinally.
part_details.wings: Black with white spots, medium length, and pointed.
part_details.tail: Black with white spots, slightly rounded at the tip.
part_details.feet: Three-toed, zygodactyl arrangement, adapted for gripping.

spatial_relations: The white stripe runs longitudinally along the center of the back.
The black cap covers the top of the head, contrasting with the white face.
The wings are attached to the sides of the body, extending outward.
